heading: Governing body
label: 152705 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152705(a)36:1506., , §§ 6, 7, .Dec. 2, 1980Pub. L. 96–48994 Stat. 2553152705(b)36:1507.The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States where incorporated” are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152705(a)36:1506., , §§ 6, 7, .Dec. 2, 1980Pub. L. 96–48994 Stat. 2553152705(b)36:1507.The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States where incorporated” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.
